title: Perfect Parity Neo: Pale Garden Awakens
description:
Pale Garden , 1:1 Backport in Neoforge ;)
Orinigal Mod By montmaj
body:
Pale Garden BackPort!!

### ✨ Feature Parity

✅ Added Pale Garden Biome, Pale Oak tree, Pale Moss block, Pale Moss carpet, Pale Hanging Moss and Pale Oak woodset

Added the Creaking mob, Creaking Spawn Egg and Creaking Heart block

Added the Resin block family

Added Eyeblossoms

### 📦 Dependencies

- [`TerraBlender`](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)

#### Orginal Mod By [montmaj](https://modrinth.com/user/montmaj)
[
Click Here for Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/perfect-parity-the-garden-awakens-edition)
